privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world log data downloaded from Loghub (Zenodo record 8196385) and SecRepo, which is ingested into a local Splunk instance. The target app name 'ssh_security_monitor', label 'SSH Security Monitor', saved search name 'SSH_Failed_Login_Summary', dashboard name 'ssh_overview', and target index 'security_logs' explicitly match the task description instructions and the corresponding verifier logic.
